{{CargoRelic
|name=That Hand
|class_id=20285
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=No one understands how this strange creature came from another world. Restrained by Earth's Will in this world, it became a collectible.
|fame=18
|art=12
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +1<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +1<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss2=Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +2<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss3=Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss4=Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000
|ss7=Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1.5k Tadpole Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Tadpole Points: 45000/45000<br> (Awakened)
}}
